prompt: Create a full-body portrait of a cute chibi angel girl in a deliberately childlike crayon drawing style on a plain white paper background. The character has very long bright sky blue hair with thick scribbly strokes, long bangs framing her face, and one small ahoge curl rising from the top of her head. She has oversized sparkling blue anime eyes, black crayon outlines, rosy pink cheek marks, and a tiny smiling red mouth. Above her head floats a rough hand-drawn golden yellow oval halo. Add two small white feathered wings behind her shoulders, outlined and shaded with light blue crayon. Dress her in a white angelic military-inspired dress with a fluffy ruffled collar, short puff sleeves, gold-brown trim, small round gold buttons down the bodice and skirt, diagonal gold-brown chest accents, a flared skirt with scalloped light-blue edging, and matching white gloves; her hands are clasped politely in front of her waist. She wears white thigh-high stockings and white boots with soft gray outlines, fuzzy cuffs, dangling pom-pom ornaments, and small yellow-and-green bow details near the ankles. Use rough wax-crayon texture, uneven sketchy lines, visible scribble shading, simple proportions, a sweet innocent expression, centered vertical composition, no background objects, no text, and a charming handmade kindergarten-doodle aesthetic.
